intro.title: How in control are you, really?
intro.subtitle: Find out where your subscriptions, deadlines, and household finances are slipping through the cracks.
intro.privacy: Takes 2 minutes · Anonymous · No sign-up required

q1.question: How many active digital subscriptions do you currently have?

q2.question: How often do you discover a charge you didn't expect?

q3.question: How clearly do you know your total monthly subscription spend?

q4.question: What usually happens to subscriptions you stop using?
q4.b: I cancel after noticing the charge
q4.c: They linger for months before I act
q4.d: I'm not sure — some may still be running

q5.question: How do you track important annual deadlines — insurance renewals, taxes, documents?
q5.a: I have a reliable reminder system
q5.b: I use calendar or email alerts
q5.d: I often find out when it's already too late

q6.question: How often do you feel like you're probably missing something important?

q7.question: How long would it take you to find your exact monthly subscription total right now?
q7.a: I know it off the top of my head
q7.d: I honestly couldn't figure it out

q8.question: Have you ever missed a payment, renewal, or important deadline?

q9.question: Who manages finances and planning in your household?
q9.a: We have a shared, organised system
q9.c: We each manage our own, loosely

q10.question: How satisfied are you with how you currently manage your finances and obligations?

q11.question: Where do your financial reminders and important deadlines currently live?

q12.question: Which of these have happened to you in the past year? Select all that apply.
q12.a: Paid for a subscription I no longer used
q12.b: Missed an insurance or document renewal
q12.c: Had a surprise charge on my statement
q12.d: Had a disagreement with a partner over an unexpected expense
q12.e: Couldn't find information about a payment or deadline when I needed it

result.waitlist_subtitle: We're building a tool that gives you one clear view of everything you're paying for, every deadline coming up, and every task your household needs to stay on top of.
result.waitlist_note: No spam. We'll reach out when we're ready.
result.success_subtitle: We'll let you know as soon as early access opens.

profile_descriptions.under_control: Your subscriptions and deadlines are in good shape.
profile_descriptions.managed_chaos: You're juggling things, but cracks are starting to show.
profile_descriptions.losing_track: Important things are slipping — it's worth getting organised.
profile_descriptions.full_chaos: Things are out of hand — a system would make a real difference.

insights.subscriptions_unknown: You're likely paying for services you've forgotten about — a quick subscription audit could save you real money this month.
insights.subscriptions_week: Surprise charges are a recurring pattern for you — seeing all your recurring payments in one place would change that.
insights.deadlines_head: You're relying on memory for things a system should own — one missed renewal can cost more than a whole year of app subscriptions.
insights.deadlines_regular: Piecing together your financial picture takes real effort — that friction means important things slip through the gaps.
insights.tools_chaos: Your reminders are scattered across tools that don't talk to each other — bringing them together could save you hours every month.
insights.tools_many: Managing money without a shared system creates blind spots — especially when household responsibilities are split loosely.
